title: TLDef Function
parameters: toolNumber	Integer expression representing which tool to return status for.
see_also:
Arm, ArmClr, Armset, Local, LocalClr, Tool, TLSet

TLDef Example

Function DisplayToolDef(toolNum As Integer)

		  If TlDef(toolNum) = False Then

		    Print "Tool ", toolNum, "is not defined"

		  Else

		    Print "Tool ", toolNum, ": ",

		    Print TlSet(toolNum)

		  EndIf

		Fend
examples:
Function DisplayToolDef(toolNum As Integer)
		  If TlDef(toolNum) = False Then
		    Print "Tool ", toolNum, "is not defined"
		  Else
		    Print "Tool ", toolNum, ": ",
		    Print TlSet(toolNum)
		  EndIf
		Fend
